response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC is at critical survival threshold (1 hour remaining); accepting 0.5 kWh would breach your own minimum operating margin and risk cascading failure of the highest-capacity resource the neighborhood depends on.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r1c2. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=balanced, share_min_soc_frac=0.25, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Neighborhood in cascading critical distress; eight peers at SoC floor with repeated urgent requests; I am the highest-capacity remaining resource but my own survival margin is critically tight with only 1 hour remaining..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
